Linked Failure Mode: Crash load-path folding initiates outside intended crush zone
Recommended Validation Test: Frontal crash CAE correlation and full vehicle barrier test
Test Objective: Confirm intended crush initiation and stable load path
Acceptance Criteria: Crash pulse intrusion and deformation mode meet program target

Linked Failure Mode: Spot weld fatigue at rail flange
Recommended Validation Test: Rail flange durability rig with weld nugget teardown
Test Objective: Confirm rail flange welds survive durability loading
Acceptance Criteria: No weld crack before 100 percent target cycles and nugget size remains above 5.5 mm

Recommended Validation Test: Closed rail e-coat coverage sectioning and 96 cycle corrosion test
Test Objective: Confirm closed rail overlap receives coating and resists corrosion
Acceptance Criteria: E-coat film build at least 10 microns on internal overlap and no red rust before 60 cycles

Recommended Validation Test: Service bracket pull-out and shaker durability test
Test Objective: Confirm fastener edge distance and emboss carry service loads
Acceptance Criteria: Pull-out force at least 1.7 times max service load with no local crack after shaker durability
